notes: Prospectors Plus 4.1.0 - NEW Geodes mode. A dedicated mode for geode builds with very slow dig + shake animations (like 10% dig-speed shovels): it waits out each slow fill animation instead of false-nudging, uses the green dig-bar to know a dig actually started, keeps shaking until the pan is truly empty, and runs the normal momentum shake (not treasure's strafe). Comes with a one-click 'v3 - geode' preset and a ready-tuned 'Geode Farm' build on the Builds page. Also: a live dig-delay countdown in the HUD + Run page, a much smoother/faster shake (fewer screen reads per click), and a tunable pan-empty threshold. Find Geodes under Modes in the sidebar.
